question: Dame el scorecard completo por ejecutiva: valor despachado, fill rate, % entrega a tiempo, new wins, OCs estancadas y cartera vencida.
sql:
WITH
-- Valor despachado, fill rate y on-time por ejecutiva
despachos AS (
  SELECT
    c.executive,
    REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.executive,'@',1),'.',' ') AS ejecutiva,
    SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd,
    SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) *
        COALESCE(NULLIF(par.trm+0,0), NULLIF(po.trm+0,0),
          (SELECT value FROM trm_daily WHERE date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000)
    ) AS valor_cop,
    SUM(par.quantity) AS dispatched_kilos,
    SUM(pop.quantity) AS total_kilos,
    SUM(CASE WHEN par.dispatch_date <= pop.delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_lines,
    COUNT(par.id) AS total_lines
  FROM partials par
  JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON par.product_order_id = pop.id AND pop.muestra=0
  JOIN purchase_orders po ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
  WHERE par.type='real'
    AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
-- New wins por ejecutiva
new_wins AS (
  SELECT
    c.executive,
    COUNT(DISTINCT po.order_consecutive) AS new_wins
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  WHERE po.is_new_win=1
    AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
-- OCs estancadas (>7 días sin despacho, activas)
estancadas AS (
  SELECT
    c.executive,
    COUNT(DISTINCT po.order_consecutive) AS ocs_estancadas
  FROM purchase_orders po
  JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
  WHERE po.status IN ('pending','processing','parcial_status')
    AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), po.order_creation_date) > 7
  GROUP BY c.executive
),
-- Cartera vencida por ejecutiva
cartera_vencida AS (
  SELECT
    c.executive,
    SUM(CAST(ca.saldo_vencido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) AS cartera_vencida
  FROM cartera ca
  JOIN clients c ON ca.nit = c.nit
  WHERE ca.fecha_cartera = (SELECT MAX(fecha_cartera) FROM cartera)
    AND ca.dias < 0
  GROUP BY c.executive
)
SELECT
  d.ejecutiva,
  d.valor_usd,
  d.valor_cop,
  ROUND(d.dispatched_kilos/d.total_kilos*100,1) AS fill_rate,
  ROUND(d.on_time_lines/d.total_lines*100,1) AS pct_entrega_a_tiempo,
  COALESCE(nw.new_wins,0) AS new_wins,
  COALESCE(e.ocs_estancadas,0) AS ocs_estancadas,
  COALESCE(cv.cartera_vencida,0) AS cartera_vencida
FROM despachos d
LEFT JOIN new_wins nw ON d.executive = nw.executive
LEFT JOIN estancadas e ON d.executive = e.executive
LEFT JOIN cartera_vencida cv ON d.executive = cv.executive
ORDER BY d.valor_usd DESC

question: muestrame los clientes con mas ventas
sql:
SELECT 
  c.client_name AS client_name,
  c.nit AS nit,
  SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos,
  ROUND(SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)), 2) AS valor_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * 
    COALESCE(NULLIF(par.trm+0,0), NULLIF(po.trm+0,0), 
      (SELECT value FROM trm_daily WHERE date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000)), 0) AS valor_cop
FROM partials par
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON par.product_order_id = pop.id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
JOIN purchase_orders po ON par.order_id = po.id
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
WHERE par.type = 'real'
  AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.nit
ORDER BY valor_cop DESC;

question: muestrame los clientes con mas ventas
sql:
SELECT 
  c.client_name,
  c.nit,
  REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.executive,'@',1),'.',' ') AS ejecutiva,
  SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos,
  SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd,
  SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) * 
      COALESCE(NULLIF(par.trm+0,0), NULLIF(po.trm+0,0), 
        (SELECT value FROM trm_daily WHERE date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000)
  ) AS valor_cop
FROM partials par
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON par.product_order_id = pop.id AND pop.muestra = 0
JOIN purchase_orders po ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE par.type = 'real'
  AND par.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.nit, c.executive
ORDER BY valor_usd DESC
LIMIT 20

question: donde puedo modificar la proforma
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion, 
  SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos, 
  SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE po.status = 'pending' AND pop.muestra = 0
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;

question: que ordenes de compra estan a nombre de camila.quintero@finearom.com en marzo?
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc,
       c.client_name,
       c.nit,
       po.status,
       po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
       SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos,
       SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.executive = 'camila.quintero@finearom.com'
  AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  AND pop.muestra = 0
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.status, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;

question: quiero ver los clientes que tieneen como ejecutivo camila quintero
sql:
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit, c.city AS ciudad, c.client_type AS tipo_cliente
FROM clients c
WHERE LOWER(c.executive) = 'camila.quintero@finearom.com'
ORDER BY c.client_name;

question: revisa los clientes que salgan con este correo daniela.aristizabal@finearom.com,claudia.cueter@finearom.com
sql:
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit, c.city AS ciudad, c.client_type AS tipo_cliente
FROM clients c
WHERE LOWER(c.executive) IN ('daniela.aristizabal@finearom.com', 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com')
ORDER BY c.client_name;

question: no pero revisa porque hay unos que salen con los correos pegados
sql:
SELECT c.client_name AS cliente, c.nit, c.city AS ciudad, c.client_type AS tipo_cliente, c.executive AS ejecutiva
FROM clients c
WHERE LOWER(c.executive) LIKE '%daniela.aristizabal@finearom.com%'
  AND LOWER(c.executive) LIKE '%claudia.cueter@finearom.com%'
ORDER BY c.client_name;

question: cual es la orden mas grande de maria.ortega
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc, c.client_name, c.nit, po.status, po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
  SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos, SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.executive = 'maria.ortega@finearom.com'
  AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.status, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY kilos DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: cual es la orden mas grande de maria juliana ortega
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc, c.client_name, c.nit, 
  REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.executive,'@',1),'.',' ') AS ejecutiva,
  po.status, po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
  SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos, 
  SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.executive IN ('maria.ortega@finearom.com','juliana.pardo@finearom.com')
  AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, c.executive, po.status, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY kilos DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: claudia.cueter que ordenes de compra itene para el mes?
sql:
SELECT
  po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc,
  c.client_name,
  c.nit,
  po.status,
  po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
  SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos,
  ROUND(SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)),2) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  AND REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.executive,'@',1),'.',' ') = 'claudia cueter'
  AND pop.muestra = 0
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.status, po.order_creation_date
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC

question: QUE ORDENES TIENE CLAUDIA.CUERTER ESTE MES DE MARZO?
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc,
  c.client_name AS cliente,
  c.nit AS nit,
  po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
  po.status AS estado,
  SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.executive = 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com'
  AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  AND pop.muestra = 0
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date, po.status
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;

question: TODAS, LAS PROCESADAS Y PENDIENTES
sql:
SELECT po.order_consecutive AS numero_oc,
  c.client_name AS cliente,
  c.nit AS nit,
  po.order_creation_date AS fecha_creacion,
  po.status AS estado,
  SUM(pop.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd
FROM purchase_orders po
JOIN clients c ON po.client_id = c.id
JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id
JOIN products p ON pop.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.executive = 'claudia.cueter@finearom.com'
  AND po.order_creation_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
  AND po.status IN ('pending','processing')
  AND pop.muestra = 0
GROUP BY po.order_consecutive, c.client_name, c.nit, po.order_creation_date, po.status
ORDER BY po.order_creation_date DESC;
